companies.name: Panchakanya Wire Industry
companies.description: Panchakanya Wire industry was established in 1989 and since then we are meeting the most exacting specifications and requirements of our customers. In the wire industry, we are serving with the latest technology coupled with a wealth of experience and expertise. A range of wires cater to the needs of market segments in Nepal and we are thriving to grow.

companies.name: Eco-Bar
companies.description: Our Eco bars are High Strength Eco bars that are made by a process of cold rolling from the mild steel coils. These Eco Bars come out in small diameters 4.75mm and 7mm. Due to small diameters and high strength, the bars reinforcement gets more closely placed and thus leads to the smaller and evenly distributed bending, giving it a perfect shape.

companies.name: Flame Pro
companies.description: Panchakanya CPVC Flame Pro products are manufactured from special thermoplastic known chemically as Chlorinated Polyvinyl Chloride (CPVC) compound developed by Sekisui, Japan. The product is designed with an unique advantage that has resistance to fire, superior flow.

companies.name: Transparent Fittings
companies.description: Panchakanya CPVC transparent fittings are the first of its kind to be manufactured in Nepal which also makes Panchakanya the second manufacturer in the world.

companies.name: Panchakanya RMC
companies.description: Ready mixed concrete refers to a concrete that is already mixed instead of being assorted on the job site which makes the process and logistics easier. It includes cement, aggregates, sand, water and other chemicals that are transported to the site with effective logistics and can be used straight without further treatment.

companies.name: Panchakanya Stainless Steel Water Tank
companies.description: Introduced in the year 2013 for the first time in the country, it is a premium Water Tank that provides long-lasting solutions for commercial and industrial water storage ensuring longevity, hygiene, and safety. It is available in both vertical and horizontal designs and is made of SS Tank 304 & 316 Grade.

companies.name: Panchakanya Structural Steel
companies.description: A unique concept for transforming any space into a beautiful habitat for residential, commercial, schools, health post buildings and many more. A major breakthrough in the construction code, PSS structures are feasible and engineered to give shape to your dream project.

companies.name: Panchasakti CGI
companies.description: CGI Sheets are one of the most preferred cladding materials, especially for roofing. These sheets are available in various designs and profiles to enhance the aesthetic properties of your building, featuring high tensile strength and excellent corrosion resistance properties.

companies.name: Nepal Bitumen and Barrel Udyog Ltd.
companies.description: Nepal Bitumen and Barrel Udyog Ltd. (NBBUL) is a Public Limited Company that was established by Nepal Oil Corporation Limited in 1986. The company was taken over by Panchakanya Group in the year 1994 under the government's privatization program and is the only industry to supply bitumen and bituminous products in the country.

companies.name: Panchakanya uPVC
companies.description: Established in 2009, Panchakanya uPVC crafts high-performance doors and windows designed for energy efficiency, exceptional insulation, and durability. Their products are engineered from Unplasticized Polyvinyl Chloride (uPVC) reinforced with galvanized steel to endure Nepal's diverse climate.

companies.name: Panchakanya Bathware
companies.description: Founded in 2025, Panchakanya Bathware is the newest addition to the esteemed Panchakanya Group. Our quality bathware products combine cutting-edge German technology with high-grade brass, tailored for the Nepali market. Panchakanya Bathware offers a well-researched solution—high-quality, stylish, and affordable faucets, showers, and accessories that bring luxury within reach.

companies.name: Ujjwal Trading
companies.description: Ujjwal trading is the sister concern subsidiary of Panchakanya Group which was established in 1999, in the name of Ujjwal Trading Center. This trading wing was opened with a vision to operate in order to serve the local industries and business centres by importing and distributing different chemicals and industrial raw materials, different building material. This wing is rigorously involved in trading and distributing various kinds of chemicals and raw materials that related to construction and cement industry.

companies.name: Prism Cement
companies.description: This trading wing is also responsible for importing and sales distribution of Prism cement, which is one of the leading brands of India. This brand of cement is also famous in Nepalese market for being a superior quality brand as compared with other.

companies.name: Pexim International
companies.description: Pexim International is a trading company under the flagship of Panchakanya Group. This wing is a trading wing for recycling the scrap materials and reuses them for making some of the useful products. Pexim is a pioneer in the business recycling of scrap materials.

companies.name: Ujjwal Energy Pvt Ltd
companies.description: Ujjwal Energy Pvt Ltd, a unit of the Panchakanya Group, is a private company registered for the specific purpose of integrating as well as trading of solar energy system & renewable energy technologies in Nepal. This company believes that the electricity is one of the strong means of development and is contributing by providing solar panels as alternative means for the generation of electricity. Moreover the simplicity of this technology makes it ideal for using in rural or difficulty accessed areas isolated from network.

companies.name: Neo Solar Power
companies.description: Neo Solar Power (NSP) was founded in December 2005. NSP is a world class leading solar cell manufacturer specializing in research, development and manufacturing of high-efficiency solar cells and modules. NSP is the largest solar cell producer in Taiwan.
